heading: Step 1: View the collections in a database.
body:
Click on the name of the database.

> **Note:** Atlas bases the document count that appears on this tab
> on cached metadata using [collStats](manual/reference/command/collStats). This count might differ from
> the actual document count in the collection. For example, an
> [unexpected shutdown](manual/reference/command/collStats) can throw off the
> count. Use the [db.collection.countDocuments()](manual/reference/method/db.collection.countDocuments) method for
> the most accurate document count.
